records.m_Talk_ENG: It was even more epic in person than in the video! I'll never forget what happened today!

records.m_Talk_FRA: It was all squishy-looking and I didn't want to touch it, but I defeated it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Boss did help me a little, but could that one be a Category 3 C.O.?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Boss did help me a little, but could that one be a Category 3 C.O.?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you so obsessed with joining our squad?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you so obsessed with joining our squad?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you so obsessed with joining our squad?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We aren't that nice to newcomers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We aren't that nice to newcomers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We aren't that nice to newcomers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander is always reckless, and Shiyoon slacks off whenever he gets the chance.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander is always reckless, and Shiyoon slacks off whenever he gets the chance.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, the Fenrir Squad isn't as glamorous or great as you think it is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, we are mercenaries who'd do anything for the right price.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, we are mercenaries who'd do anything for the right price.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, you aren't!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, you aren't!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, you aren't!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You and the Fenrir Squad are heroes who saved the world, Ms. Mina!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You and the Fenrir Squad are heroes who saved the world, Ms. Mina!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You and the Fenrir Squad are heroes who saved the world, Ms. Mina!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because you stopped the Qliphoth Game, many lives were saved!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because you stopped the Qliphoth Game, many lives were saved!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because you stopped the Qliphoth Game, many lives were saved!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Lives...
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Lives...
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Lives...

records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if people don't believe it, I know it's true! I really do!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I want to become someone like that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I want to become someone like that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I want to become someone like that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: An amazing person who saves the world!
records.m_Talk_DEU: An amazing person who saves the world!
records.m_Talk_FRA: An amazing person who saves the world!

records.m_Talk_DEU: However...

records.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle Wright...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was all squishy-looking and I didn't want to touch it, but I defeated it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was all squishy-looking and I didn't want to touch it, but I defeated it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was all squishy-looking and I didn't want to touch it, but I defeated it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Boss did help me a little, but could that one be a Category 3 C.O.?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Boss did help me a little, but could that one be a Category 3 C.O.?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Boss did help me a little, but could that one be a Category 3 C.O.?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you so obsessed with joining our squad?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you so obsessed with joining our squad?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you so obsessed with joining our squad?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We aren't that nice to newcomers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We aren't that nice to newcomers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We aren't that nice to newcomers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Commander is always reckless, and Shiyoon slacks off whenever he gets the chance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Commander is always reckless, and Shiyoon slacks off whenever he gets the chance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Commander is always reckless, and Shiyoon slacks off whenever he gets the chance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, the Fenrir Squad isn't as glamorous or great as you think it is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, the Fenrir Squad isn't as glamorous or great as you think it is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, the Fenrir Squad isn't as glamorous or great as you think it is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, we are mercenaries who'd do anything for the right price.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, we are mercenaries who'd do anything for the right price.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, we are mercenaries who'd do anything for the right price.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, you aren't!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, you aren't!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, you aren't!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You and the Fenrir Squad are heroes who saved the world, Ms. Mina!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You and the Fenrir Squad are heroes who saved the world, Ms. Mina!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You and the Fenrir Squad are heroes who saved the world, Ms. Mina!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because you stopped the Qliphoth Game, many lives were saved!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because you stopped the Qliphoth Game, many lives were saved!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because you stopped the Qliphoth Game, many lives were saved!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Lives...
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Lives...
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Lives...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if people don't believe it, I know it's true! I really do!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if people don't believe it, I know it's true! I really do!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if people don't believe it, I know it's true! I really do!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I want to become someone like that!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I want to become someone like that!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I want to become someone like that!

root.m_Talk_ENG: An amazing person who saves the world!
root.m_Talk_DEU: An amazing person who saves the world!
root.m_Talk_FRA: An amazing person who saves the world!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle, I'm sorry to burst your bubble but the C.O. you defeated was far from being a Category 3.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle, I'm sorry to burst your bubble but the C.O. you defeated was far from being a Category 3.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle, I'm sorry to burst your bubble but the C.O. you defeated was far from being a Category 3.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?! But that can't be!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?! But that can't be!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?! But that can't be!

root.m_Talk_ENG: However...
root.m_Talk_DEU: However...
root.m_Talk_FRA: However...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're up for it, I'll let you retake the interview.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're up for it, I'll let you retake the interview.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're up for it, I'll let you retake the interview.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I believe my attitude this morning was insincere as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I believe my attitude this morning was insincere as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I believe my attitude this morning was insincere as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: R-really?! I didn't mishear that, right?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: R-really?! I didn't mishear that, right?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: R-really?! I didn't mishear that, right?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yippee! I'll be sure to pass this time!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yippee! I'll be sure to pass this time!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yippee! I'll be sure to pass this time!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle Wright...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle Wright...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle Wright...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. You have finally found your role.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. You have finally found your role.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. You have finally found your role.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There, you will gain a lot of experiences and meet lots of people.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There, you will gain a lot of experiences and meet lots of people.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There, you will gain a lot of experiences and meet lots of people.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, I will follow your story from the back of the stage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, I will follow your story from the back of the stage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, I will follow your story from the back of the stage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Until your story reaches its end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Until your story reaches its end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Until your story reaches its end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe it's no coincidence that you are all here as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe it's no coincidence that you are all here as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe it's no coincidence that you are all here as well.
